title: Crew Sessions Hosted
query: SELECT COUNT(*) AS sessions, COALESCE(SUM(OnCrewCount), 0) AS crewSlots FROM EndCrewSession WHERE event_timestamp >= :startDate AND event_timestamp < :endDate

details.text: {sessions} multicrew session(s) hosted with {crewSlots} total crew-slot(s) served during the report period. Hosting multicrew is an act of community — every session is a shared adventure where someone trusted you with their time, and you provided the ship.
details.help: EndCrewSession fires at the end of a hosted session. OnCrewCount is the number of crew members who participated. sessions drives the title.

tagLines: Multicrew hosting activity compiled. Sessions captained and crew member participation noted.
You opened the airlock and let them aboard. Every session is someone else's memory of your ship.
Hosting is the captain's burden and privilege. Everyone who flew with you felt what you built.
